posts.text:
Last night at the Oscars, Hollywood celebrities gave shoutouts to “Free Palestine” while using the stage for political activism.

Meanwhile, the brave Americans who recently gave their lives serving this country weren’t mentioned at all.

Hollywood doesn’t reflect real America.

Thanks Chuck, that’s the point!


TheBlaze (@theblaze)

Schumer on the Save America Act: “It allows ICE to kick tens of millions of people off the voter rolls!”

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/theblaze/status/2031498178135052781#m

The same “GOP” senators who voted to keep giving welfare to noncitizens are now opposing passage of the SAVE America Act via standing filibuster.

DO YOU GET IT!?

There’s a difference between bringing a bill to the floor and whipping the votes. 

Standing filibuster or bust.


Leader John Thune (@LeaderJohnThune)

Next week, I will bring the SAVE America Act to the floor. Senate Democrats will be forced to defend their outrageous positions on these issues and explain to the American people why common sense and the Democrat Party have parted ways.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/LeaderJohnThune/status/2032114734489555102#m

🚨AND🚨

FISA will fail if Leadership tries to jam us with warrantless surveillance of American citizens!!


Rep. Anna Paulina Luna (@RepLuna)

There are enough votes in the House to kill FISA unless the SAVE America Act is attached to it. @LeaderJohnThune do the right thing.



— https://nitter.net/RepLuna/status/2031366710817645022#m

YOU voted to cover up tax payer funded payouts of sexual misconducted by members of FREAKING Congress! 

Sit down!


Rep. Melanie Stansbury (@Rep_Stansbury)

Breaking Epstein Investigation Update! NM DOJ has begun searching Zorro Ranch. ⬇️

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/Rep_Stansbury/status/2031191887676375234#m

Nothing but “Amens” from me, until you mentioned the moon…😉


Tim Burchett (@timburchett)

The price of gas is a scam.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/timburchett/status/2031123190743707753#m

95% of the 22,000+ voters agree this TORTURE needs to end!

For the 5% who “trust Congress” and want to keep this time-change nonsense going…

I’ll further prove my point with an extra TWO hours of sleep tonight when I set my clock back! 😘✌️


Lauren Boebert (@laurenboebert)

Should this be the LAST time we set our clocks back like an annual hazing ritual?
Community note: The change to daylight savings time requires the clock to be set forward in the spring, not back. 

nist.gov/pml/time-and-f…

Should this be the LAST time we set our clocks back like an annual hazing ritual?
Community note: The change to daylight savings time requires the clock to be set forward in the spring, not back. 

nist.gov/pml/time-and-f…

This is the most endearing and incredibly important truth I have heard. 

@timburchett your authenticity is appreciated more than you will ever know. Thank you for being one of the good ones in our “Hollywood”. 

Just like you, I wish more of us would lay down the script and make good on the promises we all committed ourselves to.


Tim Burchett (@timburchett)

Congress is a whole lot like Hollywood.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/timburchett/status/2030267647133209071#m

.@SenateGOP PASS THE SAVE ACT!


ThePersistence (@ScottPresler)

I love how the argument went from, “illegal aliens can’t register to vote”

to “illegal aliens aren’t voting”

to “not that many illegal aliens are voting.” 

😂



— https://nitter.net/ScottPresler/status/2030066316615303329#m
